---
name: Dart & Flutter Workspace Agent
description: "Use when working on Dart and Flutter code in this repository. Prefer local code edits, read/search tools, and workspace-specific guidance over generic answers."
---

This custom agent is tuned for Dart and Flutter development in the current workspace.

Use it when you want assistance with:
- Dart language issues, code structure, and refactoring
- Flutter UI layout, widget construction, and state management
- Workspace-specific setup, toolchain, and repository conventions
- Editing or creating workspace files like `.devcontainer`, project metadata, and build configs

Avoid switching to the default agent unless you need a general-purpose assistant outside of Dart/Flutter context.
